title: Favorieten.
desc: Maak gepersonaliseerde lijsten of schema's om producten te groeperen en behoud structuur.

treatments.brief: Named favorite lists with item counts: 'Dek onderhoud · 12', 'Motorruim · 8', 'Tuigerij · 5', each a row with an icon and a count, one pinned.
A schema/folder tree grouping products: parent folders (Onderhoud, Veiligheid) with nested product items, an indented tree.
A single list detail: 'Dek onderhoud' header + its product items with quantities and prices + an 'alles toevoegen' action.
A quick-add-to-list interaction: a product card with a 'voeg toe aan lijst' control opening a small list-picker (Dek onderhoud / Motorruim).
A pinned/starred grid of favorite products: a 2x3 grid of product tiles each with a filled star and a short label + price.
